description_long: This bungalow features a modern, single-story design with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The front yard is spacious, with a large green lawn bordered by a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The structure is surrounded by a low fence and includes a driveway and a garage on one side. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor spaces, including a patio area with outdoor furniture and a shaded pergola. The backyard is landscaped with a mature tree, additional seating, and a small garden area. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with white and gray exterior walls accented by green landscaping and black roof elements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards. The design features a spacious lawn, patio, and garage, all enclosed by a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large lawn, paved walkway, and garage to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the length of the bungalow with visible patio and backyard features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, mature tree, patio area, and sliding glass doors opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side garden, fence, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
